text_block_list.text: One day in the academy hallway...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That should be all of it.

Air Groove appears to be deep in thought as she
stares at a pile of cardboard boxes in the corner
of the hallway.
choice_data_list: What's with all these cardboard boxes?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Do not even think of approaching me with such
imprudence. I shall put these boxes away myself.
Your concern is not required.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
An accumulation of superfluous notices, returned
loan umbrellas, and damaged academy
equipment.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As part of the student council, I will re-sort these
items in another room.
choice_data_list:
Will you be all right carrying all that by
yourself?

Will you be all right carrying all that by
yourself?

You'd better hurry if you want to get through
all of that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As part of the student council, I will re-sort these
items in another room.
choice_data_list:
Will you be all right carrying all that by
yourself?

Will you be all right carrying all that by
yourself?

You'd better hurry if you want to get through
all of that.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. Are you attempting to express concern for
me? This poses no challenge to one who trains on
a daily basis.

Air Groove picks up the pile of cardboard boxes
like a bag of feathers and walks away.

It is evident by how steady her steps are that she
has trained every inch of her body.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. If I cannot handle this trifling pile in a
timely manner...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Then I do not deserve to show my face to others
as the Empress or the vice president of the school
council.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Enough pointless chatter. I'm sure you have more
important things to do than concern yourself with
me. Be off, then.

Air Groove picks up the pile of cardboard boxes
like a bag of feathers and walks away.

She doesn't waste a single movement as she
carries the large boxes, attesting to the
thoroughness she applies to everyday life.
